'''Trefaren''' was an Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] stationed on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] approximately in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]. Admiral Trefaren asked [[Bria Tharen]] to accompany him to a reception held by the Corellian government for Imperial officers. Unbeknownst to Trefaren, Bria was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy who had infiltrated her way into the Imperial base and was using the admiral to dig up information on new weapons and ships the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was acquiring.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
